ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the participant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the participant */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the participant belongs to */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date and time the participant joined */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the participant entry */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the participant entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "is_model" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the performance metric is for a model or a participant */,
  "quantile_idx" REAL /* Quantile index for the performance metric */,
  "rt" REAL /* Reaction time (RT) value */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was recorded */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the Curve for binary classification models */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Squared Error for regression models */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error for regression models */,
  "r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value for regression models */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment in which the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_quantile_idx FOREIGN KEY ("quantile_idx") REFERENCES quantiles ("quantile_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quantiles" (
  "quantile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quantile */,
  "quantile_value" REAL /* Value of the quantile */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quantile */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the quantile */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the quantile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quantile_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the metric */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_details" TEXT /* Details of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the configuration */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance history entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  "rt" REAL /* Reaction time (RT) value */,
  "theta" REAL /* Theta value */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment in which the performance was recorded */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the performance history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_history_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_history_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)
